subcodes.first_line: O ye two precious souls! The valley of Batha was a barren wasteland and stony ground, as is attested in the text of the Holy Quran [3.5s]... ...The region of Nur is the birthplace of the Speaker on the Mount. Consider to what grandeur, importance and splendor it shall attain throughout future ages and cycles.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نفس نفیس خطه بطحاء وادی غیر ذی زرع و سنگلاخ بود چنانچه نص قرآنست از
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @symbolism of color and light
